cpu_to_motherboard_socket.description: CPU socket must exactly match motherboard socket
cpu_to_motherboard_socket.error: CPU socket {cpu.specs.socket} does not match motherboard socket {motherboard.specs.socket}

ram_type_to_motherboard.description: RAM type must match motherboard RAM type and CPU RAM support
ram_type_to_motherboard.check: ram.specs.type == motherboard.specs.ram_type AND ram.specs.type in cpu.specs.ram_support
ram_type_to_motherboard.error: RAM type {ram.specs.type} not supported by this CPU and motherboard combination

motherboard_form_factor_to_case.description: Motherboard form factor must be supported by the case
motherboard_form_factor_to_case.error: Motherboard {motherboard.specs.form_factor} does not fit in selected case

gpu_length_to_case.description: GPU length must not exceed case maximum GPU clearance
gpu_length_to_case.error: GPU length {gpu.specs.length_mm}mm exceeds case max of {case.specs.max_gpu_length_mm}mm

cooler_height_to_case.description: Air cooler height must fit inside the case
cooler_height_to_case.check: if cooler.specs.type == Air then cooler.specs.height_mm <= case.specs.max_cooler_height_mm
cooler_height_to_case.error: Cooler height {cooler.specs.height_mm}mm exceeds case clearance of {case.specs.max_cooler_height_mm}mm

cooler_socket_support.description: Cooler must support the CPU socket

cooler_tdp.description: Cooler TDP rating must be at or above CPU TDP
cooler_tdp.error: Cooler max TDP {cooler.specs.max_tdp_watts}W is below CPU TDP of {cpu.specs.tdp_watts}W

psu_wattage.description: PSU must cover total system load with 20% headroom
psu_wattage.note: 100W accounts for motherboard, RAM, storage, and fans baseline draw
psu_wattage.error: PSU {psu.specs.wattage}W insufficient. System needs at least {required}W

nvme_m2_slots.description: NVMe SSDs require M.2 slots on the motherboard
nvme_m2_slots.error: Not enough M.2 slots. Board has {motherboard.specs.m2_slots}, build needs {count}

sata_ports.description: SATA devices require available SATA ports
sata_ports.error: Not enough SATA ports for all storage devices

ram_slots.description: RAM sticks must not exceed available motherboard slots
ram_slots.error: RAM kit has {ram.specs.sticks} sticks, motherboard only has {motherboard.specs.ram_slots} slots

aio_radiator_to_case.description: AIO radiator size must be supported by the case
aio_radiator_to_case.check: if cooler.specs.type == AIO then cooler.specs.radiator_mm in case.specs.radiator_support_mm
aio_radiator_to_case.error: Case does not support {cooler.specs.radiator_mm}mm radiator. Supported sizes: {case.specs.radiator_support_mm}

developer.note: High core count CPU for compiling. Fast NVMe for large codebases.

designer.note: High VRAM GPU for rendering. Large fast NVMe for project files.

finance.note: Basic office work. No dedicated GPU needed.

executive.note: Prioritise quiet operation and premium aesthetics.

content_creator.note: Balanced high-end build. Both CPU and GPU matter for streaming and editing.

admin.note: Basic office tasks. Most budget-friendly build.

stealth.note: No RGB. Dark colours only. Noise dampened preferred.

rgb_everything.note: Full RGB build. Tempered glass case. Match RGB ecosystem.

clean_minimal.note: Clean look. Good airflow. No flashy aesthetics.

workstation.note: Silent professional build. Prioritise noise reduction.

silent.note: Silent builds get Noctua or be quiet! cooler automatically

network_topology_advisory.description: Advisory recommendations only. Network gear is NOT sold by us. Client sources independently from their IT vendor or telco.

switch_sizing.description: Calculate switch ports needed based on wired device count per floor
switch_sizing.formula: ceil(wired_devices_per_floor * 1.2) rounded up to nearest switch size

tiers.above_24_devices: 24-port managed switch with QoS (e.g. TP-Link TL-SG3428)

switch_sizing.multi_floor_rule: One switch per floor if devices per floor exceeds 8. Connect floors via uplink cable.
switch_sizing.managed_switch_rule: Recommend managed switch if office has mixed roles needing priority bandwidth (developers and designers on same network as finance)
switch_sizing.nas_placement: Place NAS and high priority roles on same switch to minimise file transfer latency

router_sizing.description: Select router based on total user count and remote work needs

tiers.under_50_users: Single WAN business router (e.g. TP-Link ER605)
tiers.over_200_users: Enterprise grade router — consult IT vendor

router_sizing.vpn_rule: Always recommend VPN-capable router if company has remote workers or multiple office locations

nas_sizing.description: Recommend NAS only if team has shared file storage needs
trigger_conditions: Team has designers or content creators sharing large files
Multiple users need access to same project files

tiers.under_15_users_basic: 2-bay NAS (e.g. WD My Cloud EX2 Ultra)

nas_sizing.video_editing_rule: If designers or editors share large video files always recommend minimum 4-bay NAS regardless of team size

wifi_sizing.description: Access point recommendation based on floor size and device density
wifi_sizing.recommendation: Ceiling mount PoE WiFi 6 access point (e.g. TP-Link EAP670)
wifi_sizing.budget_option: WiFi 5 access point for smaller offices (e.g. TP-Link EAP225)

cabling_estimate.description: Estimate Cat6 cable needed for structured office wiring
cabling_estimate.formula_explanation: 15m average cable run per device, 1.2 multiplier for wastage and slack
cabling_estimate.ordering_note: Order in 305m bulk box. Add 10 x 2m patch cables per 10 desks for desk-to-port connections.

output_format.subtitle: Advisory only — not included in this quote. Source via your IT vendor or telco.
output_format.estimated_budget_note: Provide a rough RM range estimate based on standard market prices for the recommended tier
